BLACKHEADS.description: Small, dark lesions caused by clogged hair follicles where the surface is open and oxidized.
BLACKHEADS.function: Exfoliates inside the pores to remove oil and dead skin buildup.
treatments: Use a BHA exfoliant 2-3 times a week
Avoid heavy, oil-based comedogenic cosmetics
Double cleanse in the evening

WHITEHEADS.description: Closed clogged pores that stay under the skin and appear as small white bumps.
WHITEHEADS.function: Increases cell turnover to prevent pores from becoming clogged.
treatments: Apply a thin layer of retinoid at night
Use oil-free moisturizers
Do not squeeze or pop the bumps

PAPULES.description: Small, red, tender bumps on the skin caused by inflammation or infection in the hair follicles.
PAPULES.function: Reduces inflammation and kills acne-causing bacteria.
treatments: Apply spot treatment only to affected areas
Use a soothing moisturizer to reduce redness
Protect skin with SPF daily

PUSTULES.description: Inflamed bumps that look like papules but have a white or yellow tip filled with pus.
PUSTULES.function: Kills bacteria deep in the pore and dries out the pus-filled lesion.
treatments: Apply BP cream after washing your face
Use hydrocolloid patches (pimple patches) overnight
Avoid touching the face to prevent spreading bacteria

CYSTS.description: Large, painful, pus-filled lumps deep under the skin; the most severe form of acne.
CYSTS.function: Deep systemic treatment to reduce oil gland size and severe inflammation.
treatments: Consult a dermatologist for professional extraction or injections
Apply ice packs to reduce pain and swelling
Do not attempt to pop, as this causes deep scarring

NODULES.description: Large, hard, painful lumps that develop deep under the skin surface without a visible head.
NODULES.function: Targets deep-seated infection and prevents permanent tissue damage.
treatments: Seek medical advice for prescription-strength creams
Maintain a consistent, gentle skincare routine
Avoid harsh physical scrubs which can worsen the pain

ACNE.description: General acne condition consisting of mixed lesions.
ACNE.function: Provides general antibacterial and oil-control properties.
treatments: Wash face twice daily with a pH-balanced cleanser
Ensure all makeup and sunscreen is non-comedogenic
Keep pillowcases clean and stay hydrated
